items.title: Banks have a busy week: Fed decision, Goldman conference, & more
items.description: It's an important week for banks and the financial sector (XLF), from the Federal Reserve's interest rate decision to Goldman Sachs's (GS) industry conference. Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter David Hollerith joins Market Domination Overtime host Josh Lipton to outline what's in store for the sector this week. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination Overtime.

items.title: Investor Quits 9-to-5 Job After Reaching $14K Per Month in Dividends, Shares High-Yield Portfolio – 'The Freedom And Time With Family is Priceless'
Medline aiming to raise $5.37 billion in biggest US IPO this year
items.description: Investing.com -- Healthcare manufacturing giant Medline has filed for a 179,000,000 share IPO on the Nasdaq Global Select Market, with a price range of $26-$30 per share, potentially raising up to $5.37 billion in what would be the largest US initial public offering of 2025.

items.title: Virtus Pushes Into Private Markets With Majority Stake in Keystone
items.description: VRTS moves into private markets with a majority stake in Keystone to add asset-backed lending capabilities.

items.title: Goldman Sachs (GS) Moves to Expand Asset Management With $2 Billion Innovator Acquisition
items.description: The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. (NYSE:GS) is included among the 14 Best US Stocks to Buy for Long Term. On December 1, The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. (NYSE:GS) announced the acquisition of Innovator Capital Management, a defined outcome ETFs provider, for roughly $2 billion. The deal is a part of Goldman’s ongoing effort to scale […]
